calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition For Order Enforcing Subpoena
Off Calendar Dec-05-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Warren A. Jackson, of Hugo Parker, LLP, Tel. 415.808.0300, for petitioners and moving party;
James G. Snell, of Perkins Coie, Tel. 650.838.4367, for non-party Twitter;
No other appearances.

ARGUED. PETITIONER GATESMAN + DAVE, INC. Hrg On Petition For Order Enforcing Subpoena is denied. Counsel for non-party shall prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
